Properties.commandText: SELECT 1

SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(*) = 0 THEN FALSE ELSE TRUE END
FROM pg_class AS cls
JOIN pg_namespace AS ns ON ns.oid = cls.relnamespace
WHERE
        cls.relkind IN ('r', 'v', 'm', 'f', 'p') AND
        ns.nspname NOT IN ('pg_catalog', 'information_schema') AND
        -- Exclude tables which are members of PG extensions
        NOT EXISTS (
            SELECT 1 FROM pg_depend WHERE
                classid=(
                    SELECT cls.oid
                    FROM pg_class AS cls
                             JOIN pg_namespace AS ns ON ns.oid = cls.relnamespace
                    WHERE relname='pg_class' AND ns.nspname='pg_catalog'
                ) AND
                objid=cls.oid AND
                deptype IN ('e', 'x')
        )

SELECT a."Id", a."ConcurrencyStamp", a."Name", a."NormalizedName"
FROM "AspNetRoles" AS a
WHERE a."NormalizedName" = @normalizedName
LIMIT 1

FROM "AspNetRoles" AS a
WHERE a."NormalizedName" = @normalizedName
LIMIT 1

Properties.commandText:
SELECT m0."Id", m0."ActivoId", a."Placa" AS "ActivoPlaca", a."Nombre" AS "ActivoNombre", m0."PuntoLecturaId", m0."TipoMovimiento"::text AS "TipoMovimiento", m0."Autorizado", m0."AlarmaActivada", m0."FechaRegistro"
FROM (
    SELECT m."Id", m."ActivoId", m."AlarmaActivada", m."Autorizado", m."FechaRegistro", m."PuntoLecturaId", m."TipoMovimiento"
    FROM "Movimientos" AS m
    ORDER BY m."FechaRegistro" DESC
    LIMIT @p1 OFFSET @p
) AS m0
INNER JOIN "Activos" AS a ON m0."ActivoId" = a."Id"
ORDER BY m0."FechaRegistro" DESC

Properties.commandText:
SELECT count(*)::int
FROM "Movimientos" AS m

SELECT m0."Id", m0."ActivoId", a."Placa" AS "ActivoPlaca", a."Nombre" AS "ActivoNombre", m0."PuntoLecturaId", m0."TipoMovimiento"::text AS "TipoMovimiento", m0."Autorizado", m0."AlarmaActivada", m0."FechaRegistro"
FROM (
    SELECT m."Id", m."ActivoId", m."AlarmaActivada", m."Autorizado", m."FechaRegistro", m."PuntoLecturaId", m."TipoMovimiento"
    FROM "Movimientos" AS m
    ORDER BY m."FechaRegistro" DESC
    LIMIT @p1 OFFSET @p
) AS m0
INNER JOIN "Activos" AS a ON m0."ActivoId" = a."Id"
ORDER BY m0."FechaRegistro" DESC

Properties.commandText:
SELECT count(*)::int
FROM "Movimientos" AS m

SELECT m0."Id", m0."ActivoId", a."Placa" AS "ActivoPlaca", a."Nombre" AS "ActivoNombre", m0."PuntoLecturaId", m0."TipoMovimiento"::text AS "TipoMovimiento", m0."Autorizado", m0."AlarmaActivada", m0."FechaRegistro"
FROM (
    SELECT m."Id", m."ActivoId", m."AlarmaActivada", m."Autorizado", m."FechaRegistro", m."PuntoLecturaId", m."TipoMovimiento"
    FROM "Movimientos" AS m
    ORDER BY m."FechaRegistro" DESC
    LIMIT @p1 OFFSET @p
) AS m0
INNER JOIN "Activos" AS a ON m0."ActivoId" = a."Id"
ORDER BY m0."FechaRegistro" DESC

    ORDER BY m."FechaRegistro" DESC
    LIMIT @p1 OFFSET @p
) AS m0

ORDER BY m0."FechaRegistro" DESC

Properties.commandText: SELECT 1

SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(*) = 0 THEN FALSE ELSE TRUE END
FROM pg_class AS cls
JOIN pg_namespace AS ns ON ns.oid = cls.relnamespace
WHERE
        cls.relkind IN ('r', 'v', 'm', 'f', 'p') AND
        ns.nspname NOT IN ('pg_catalog', 'information_schema') AND
        -- Exclude tables which are members of PG extensions
        NOT EXISTS (
            SELECT 1 FROM pg_depend WHERE
                classid=(
                    SELECT cls.oid
                    FROM pg_class AS cls
                             JOIN pg_namespace AS ns ON ns.oid = cls.relnamespace
                    WHERE relname='pg_class' AND ns.nspname='pg_catalog'
                ) AND
                objid=cls.oid AND
                deptype IN ('e', 'x')
        )

Properties.commandText:
SELECT m0."Id", m0."ActivoId", a."Placa" AS "ActivoPlaca", a."Nombre" AS "ActivoNombre", m0."PuntoLecturaId", CASE m0."TipoMovimiento"
    WHEN 0 THEN 'INGRESO'
    WHEN 1 THEN 'SALIDA'
    ELSE m0."TipoMovimiento"::text
END AS "TipoMovimiento", m0."Autorizado", m0."AlarmaActivada", m0."FechaRegistro"
FROM (
    SELECT m."Id", m."ActivoId", m."AlarmaActivada", m."Autorizado", m."FechaRegistro", m."PuntoLecturaId", m."TipoMovimiento"
    FROM "Movimientos" AS m
    ORDER BY m."FechaRegistro" DESC
    LIMIT @p1 OFFSET @p
) AS m0
INNER JOIN "Activos" AS a ON m0."ActivoId" = a."Id"
ORDER BY m0."FechaRegistro" DESC

Properties.commandText: SELECT 1

SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(*) = 0 THEN FALSE ELSE TRUE END
FROM pg_class AS cls
JOIN pg_namespace AS ns ON ns.oid = cls.relnamespace
WHERE
        cls.relkind IN ('r', 'v', 'm', 'f', 'p') AND
        ns.nspname NOT IN ('pg_catalog', 'information_schema') AND
        -- Exclude tables which are members of PG extensions
        NOT EXISTS (
            SELECT 1 FROM pg_depend WHERE
                classid=(
                    SELECT cls.oid
                    FROM pg_class AS cls
                             JOIN pg_namespace AS ns ON ns.oid = cls.relnamespace
                    WHERE relname='pg_class' AND ns.nspname='pg_catalog'
                ) AND
                objid=cls.oid AND
                deptype IN ('e', 'x')
        )

CREATE TABLE "AspNetRoles" (
    "Id" text NOT NULL,
    "Name" character varying(256),
    "NormalizedName" character varying(256),
    "ConcurrencyStamp" text,
    CONSTRAINT "PK_AspNetRoles" PRIMARY KEY ("Id")
);

CREATE TABLE "AspNetUsers" (
    "Id" text NOT NULL,
    "UserName" character varying(256),
    "NormalizedUserName" character varying(256),
    "Email" character varying(256),
    "NormalizedEmail" character varying(256),
    "EmailConfirmed" boolean NOT NULL,
    "PasswordHash" text,
    "SecurityStamp" text,
    "ConcurrencyStamp" text,
    "PhoneNumber" text,
    "PhoneNumberConfirmed" boolean NOT NULL,
    "TwoFactorEnabled" boolean NOT NULL,
    "LockoutEnd" timestamp with time zone,
    "LockoutEnabled" boolean NOT NULL,
    "AccessFailedCount" integer NOT NULL,
    CONSTRAINT "PK_AspNetUsers" PRIMARY KEY ("Id")
);

CREATE TABLE "RefreshTokens" (
    "Id" bigint GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY,
    "UserId" character varying(450) NOT NULL,
    "Token" character varying(500) NOT NULL,
    "FechaExpiracion" timestamp with time zone NOT NULL,
    "FechaCreacion" timestamp with time zone NOT NULL,
    "Revocado" boolean NOT NULL,
    CONSTRAINT "PK_RefreshTokens" PRIMARY KEY ("Id")
);

CREATE TABLE "Tags" (
    "Id" character varying(200) NOT NULL,
    "Estado" character varying(20) NOT NULL,
    "FechaRegistro" timestamp with time zone NOT NULL,
    "FechaActualizacion" timestamp with time zone NOT NULL,
    CONSTRAINT "PK_Tags" PRIMARY KEY ("Id")
);

CREATE TABLE "AspNetRoleClaims" (
    "Id" integer GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY,
    "RoleId" text NOT NULL,
    "ClaimType" text,
    "ClaimValue" text,
    CONSTRAINT "PK_AspNetRoleClaims" PRIMARY KEY ("Id"),
    CONSTRAINT "FK_AspNetRoleClaims_AspNetRoles_RoleId" FOREIGN KEY ("RoleId") REFERENCES "AspNetRoles" ("Id") ON DELETE CASCADE
);

CREATE TABLE "AspNetUserClaims" (
    "Id" integer GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY,
    "UserId" text NOT NULL,
    "ClaimType" text,
    "ClaimValue" text,
    CONSTRAINT "PK_AspNetUserClaims" PRIMARY KEY ("Id"),
    CONSTRAINT "FK_AspNetUserClaims_AspNetUsers_UserId" FOREIGN KEY ("UserId") REFERENCES "AspNetUsers" ("Id") ON DELETE CASCADE
);

CREATE TABLE "AspNetUserLogins" (
    "LoginProvider" text NOT NULL,
    "ProviderKey" text NOT NULL,
    "ProviderDisplayName" text,
    "UserId" text NOT NULL,
    CONSTRAINT "PK_AspNetUserLogins" PRIMARY KEY ("LoginProvider", "ProviderKey"),
    CONSTRAINT "FK_AspNetUserLogins_AspNetUsers_UserId" FOREIGN KEY ("UserId") REFERENCES "AspNetUsers" ("Id") ON DELETE CASCADE
);

CREATE TABLE "AspNetUserRoles" (
    "UserId" text NOT NULL,
    "RoleId" text NOT NULL,
    CONSTRAINT "PK_AspNetUserRoles" PRIMARY KEY ("UserId", "RoleId"),
    CONSTRAINT "FK_AspNetUserRoles_AspNetRoles_RoleId" FOREIGN KEY ("RoleId") REFERENCES "AspNetRoles" ("Id") ON DELETE CASCADE,
    CONSTRAINT "FK_AspNetUserRoles_AspNetUsers_UserId" FOREIGN KEY ("UserId") REFERENCES "AspNetUsers" ("Id") ON DELETE CASCADE
);

CREATE TABLE "AspNetUserTokens" (
    "UserId" text NOT NULL,
    "LoginProvider" text NOT NULL,
    "Name" text NOT NULL,
    "Value" text,
    CONSTRAINT "PK_AspNetUserTokens" PRIMARY KEY ("UserId", "LoginProvider", "Name"),
    CONSTRAINT "FK_AspNetUserTokens_AspNetUsers_UserId" FOREIGN KEY ("UserId") REFERENCES "AspNetUsers" ("Id") ON DELETE CASCADE
);

CREATE TABLE "Activos" (
    "Id" uuid NOT NULL,
    "Placa" character varying(100) NOT NULL,
    "Nombre" character varying(300) NOT NULL,
    "Categoria" character varying(100) NOT NULL,
    "TenedorResponsable" character varying(300),
    "EstadoUbicacion" character varying(30) NOT NULL,
    "TagId" character varying(200),
    "FechaRegistro" timestamp with time zone NOT NULL,
    "FechaActualizacion" timestamp with time zone NOT NULL,
    CONSTRAINT "PK_Activos" PRIMARY KEY ("Id"),
    CONSTRAINT "FK_Activos_Tags_TagId" FOREIGN KEY ("TagId") REFERENCES "Tags" ("Id") ON DELETE SET NULL
);

CREATE TABLE "TagsDaniosHistorial" (
    "Id" bigint GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY,
    "TagId" character varying(200) NOT NULL,
    "Descripcion" character varying(600) NOT NULL,
    "FechaReporte" timestamp with time zone NOT NULL,
    "ReportadoPor" character varying(300),
    CONSTRAINT "PK_TagsDaniosHistorial" PRIMARY KEY ("Id"),
    CONSTRAINT "FK_TagsDaniosHistorial_Tags_TagId" FOREIGN KEY ("TagId") REFERENCES "Tags" ("Id") ON DELETE CASCADE
);

CREATE TABLE "AutorizacionesSalida" (
    "Id" bigint GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY,
    "ActivoId" uuid NOT NULL,
    "AutorizadoPor" character varying(300) NOT NULL,
    "FechaAutorizacion" timestamp with time zone NOT NULL,
    "FechaVencimiento" timestamp with time zone,
    "Activa" boolean NOT NULL,
    CONSTRAINT "PK_AutorizacionesSalida" PRIMARY KEY ("Id"),
    CONSTRAINT "FK_AutorizacionesSalida_Activos_ActivoId" FOREIGN KEY ("ActivoId") REFERENCES "Activos" ("Id") ON DELETE CASCADE
);

CREATE TABLE "Movimientos" (
    "Id" bigint GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY,
    "ActivoId" uuid NOT NULL,
    "PuntoLecturaId" character varying(100),
    "TipoMovimiento" character varying(10) NOT NULL,
    "Autorizado" boolean NOT NULL,
    "AlarmaActivada" boolean NOT NULL,
    "FechaRegistro" timestamp with time zone NOT NULL,
    CONSTRAINT "PK_Movimientos" PRIMARY KEY ("Id"),
    CONSTRAINT "FK_Movimientos_Activos_ActivoId" FOREIGN KEY ("ActivoId") REFERENCES "Activos" ("Id") ON DELETE CASCADE
);
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX "IX_Activos_Placa" ON "Activos" ("Placa");
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX "IX_Activos_TagId" ON "Activos" ("TagId");
CREATE INDEX "IX_AspNetRoleClaims_RoleId" ON "AspNetRoleClaims" ("RoleId");
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX "RoleNameIndex" ON "AspNetRoles" ("NormalizedName");
CREATE INDEX "IX_AspNetUserClaims_UserId" ON "AspNetUserClaims" ("UserId");
CREATE INDEX "IX_AspNetUserLogins_UserId" ON "AspNetUserLogins" ("UserId");
CREATE INDEX "IX_AspNetUserRoles_RoleId" ON "AspNetUserRoles" ("RoleId");
CREATE INDEX "EmailIndex" ON "AspNetUsers" ("NormalizedEmail");
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX "UserNameIndex" ON "AspNetUsers" ("NormalizedUserName");
CREATE INDEX "IX_AutorizacionesSalida_ActivoId" ON "AutorizacionesSalida" ("ActivoId");
CREATE INDEX "IX_Movimientos_ActivoId" ON "Movimientos" ("ActivoId");
CREATE INDEX "IX_Movimientos_FechaRegistro" ON "Movimientos" ("FechaRegistro");
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX "IX_RefreshTokens_Token" ON "RefreshTokens" ("Token");
CREATE INDEX "IX_RefreshTokens_UserId" ON "RefreshTokens" ("UserId");
CREATE INDEX "IX_TagsDaniosHistorial_TagId" ON "TagsDaniosHistorial" ("TagId");

FROM pg_class AS cls
JOIN pg_namespace AS ns ON ns.oid = cls.relnamespace
WHERE
        cls.relkind IN ('r', 'v', 'm', 'f', 'p') AND
        ns.nspname NOT IN ('pg_catalog', 'information_schema') AND
        -- Exclude tables which are members of PG extensions
        NOT EXISTS (
            SELECT 1 FROM pg_depend WHERE
                classid=(
                    SELECT cls.oid
                    FROM pg_class AS cls
                             JOIN pg_namespace AS ns ON ns.oid = cls.relnamespace
                    WHERE relname='pg_class' AND ns.nspname='pg_catalog'
                ) AND
                objid=cls.oid AND
                deptype IN ('e', 'x')
        )

SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(*) = 0 THEN FALSE ELSE TRUE END
FROM pg_class AS cls
JOIN pg_namespace AS ns ON ns.oid = cls.relnamespace
WHERE
        cls.relkind IN ('r', 'v', 'm', 'f', 'p') AND
        ns.nspname NOT IN ('pg_catalog', 'information_schema') AND
        -- Exclude tables which are members of PG extensions
        NOT EXISTS (
            SELECT 1 FROM pg_depend WHERE
                classid=(
                    SELECT cls.oid
                    FROM pg_class AS cls
                             JOIN pg_namespace AS ns ON ns.oid = cls.relnamespace
                    WHERE relname='pg_class' AND ns.nspname='pg_catalog'
                ) AND
                objid=cls.oid AND
                deptype IN ('e', 'x')
        )

Properties.commandText: SELECT 1

SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(*) = 0 THEN FALSE ELSE TRUE END
FROM pg_class AS cls
JOIN pg_namespace AS ns ON ns.oid = cls.relnamespace
WHERE
        cls.relkind IN ('r', 'v', 'm', 'f', 'p') AND
        ns.nspname NOT IN ('pg_catalog', 'information_schema') AND
        -- Exclude tables which are members of PG extensions
        NOT EXISTS (
            SELECT 1 FROM pg_depend WHERE
                classid=(
                    SELECT cls.oid
                    FROM pg_class AS cls
                             JOIN pg_namespace AS ns ON ns.oid = cls.relnamespace
                    WHERE relname='pg_class' AND ns.nspname='pg_catalog'
                ) AND
                objid=cls.oid AND
                deptype IN ('e', 'x')
        )

Properties.commandText: SELECT 1

SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(*) = 0 THEN FALSE ELSE TRUE END
FROM pg_class AS cls
JOIN pg_namespace AS ns ON ns.oid = cls.relnamespace
WHERE
        cls.relkind IN ('r', 'v', 'm', 'f', 'p') AND
        ns.nspname NOT IN ('pg_catalog', 'information_schema') AND
        -- Exclude tables which are members of PG extensions
        NOT EXISTS (
            SELECT 1 FROM pg_depend WHERE
                classid=(
                    SELECT cls.oid
                    FROM pg_class AS cls
                             JOIN pg_namespace AS ns ON ns.oid = cls.relnamespace
                    WHERE relname='pg_class' AND ns.nspname='pg_catalog'
                ) AND
                objid=cls.oid AND
                deptype IN ('e', 'x')
        )

Properties.commandText:
SELECT count(*)::int
FROM "Activos" AS a

SELECT count(*)::int
FROM "Movimientos" AS m

SELECT count(*)::int
FROM "Activos" AS a
WHERE a."EstadoUbicacion" = 'DENTRO_INSTALACIONES'

SELECT count(*)::int
FROM "Activos" AS a
WHERE a."EstadoUbicacion" = 'FUERA_INSTALACIONES'

SELECT count(*)::int
FROM "Tags" AS t

SELECT count(*)::int
FROM "Tags" AS t
WHERE t."Estado" = 'ASIGNADO'

SELECT count(*)::int
FROM "Tags" AS t
WHERE t."Estado" = 'DISPONIBLE'

SELECT m0."Id", m0."ActivoId", a."Placa" AS "ActivoPlaca", a."Nombre" AS "ActivoNombre", m0."PuntoLecturaId", m0."TipoMovimiento"::text AS "TipoMovimiento", m0."Autorizado", m0."AlarmaActivada", m0."FechaRegistro"
FROM (
    SELECT m."Id", m."ActivoId", m."AlarmaActivada", m."Autorizado", m."FechaRegistro", m."PuntoLecturaId", m."TipoMovimiento"
    FROM "Movimientos" AS m
    ORDER BY m."FechaRegistro" DESC
    LIMIT @p1 OFFSET @p
) AS m0
INNER JOIN "Activos" AS a ON m0."ActivoId" = a."Id"
ORDER BY m0."FechaRegistro" DESC

SELECT count(*)::int
FROM "Movimientos" AS m
WHERE m."TipoMovimiento" = 'INGRESO' AND m."FechaRegistro" >= @p AND m."FechaRegistro" < @p1

SELECT count(*)::int
FROM "Movimientos" AS m
WHERE m."TipoMovimiento" = 'SALIDA' AND m."FechaRegistro" >= @p AND m."FechaRegistro" < @p1

        cls.relkind IN ('r', 'v', 'm', 'f', 'p') AND

        NOT EXISTS (
            SELECT 1 FROM pg_depend WHERE
                classid=(
                    SELECT cls.oid
                    FROM pg_class AS cls
